arts.ttl: LIVE: Liverpool look to extend lead atop table, face Leicester
Michael Owen takes aim at Man City supporters amid Pep Guardiola crisis and Liverpool title race
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as last season's Champions have won just one of their last 13 games in all competitions.

arts.ttl: Luis Diaz and Darwin Nunez decisions made as Liverpool make two changes for Leicester City clash
arts.sum: Team news in full from Anfield as Premier League leaders Liverpool host Leicester City

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Liverpool as Ruud van Nistelrooy makes Danny Ward decision
arts.sum: Jakub Stolarczyk and Patson Daka have been handed their first Leicester City starts of the season with Mads Hermansen and Jamie Vardy not fit to face Liverpool. Stolarczyk, who returned from a summer foot break with an appearance for the Under-21s last week, makes his Premier League debut in goal, replacing Danny Ward after his struggles against Wolves and with Hermansen still not recovered from a groin injury.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Leicester LIVE: Premier League team news, line-ups and more as Reds look to go seven points clear
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s Liverpool welcome a struggling Leicester side, with the Reds looking to extend their lead at the top

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s stance on signing Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk confirmed
arts.sum: An insight into the stance of the powers that be at Real Madrid when it comes to the potential signing of Virgil van Dijk has on Thursday been forthcoming online.…

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy hints at Odsonne Edouard decision ahead of January transfer window
arts.sum: Leicester City will consider cutting ties with striker Odsonne Edouard next month in order to free up a loan spot for Ruud van Nistelrooy to strengthen his squad. “I’m going to look at how many players in each position I need, and so far it’s been Jamie and Patson who have been chosen.

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa’s Liverpool stint in jeopardy: Potential Serie A return on the horizon
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa's adventure with Liverpool has not unfolded as hoped, and with the January transfer window approaching, a premature departure is becoming increasingly plausible. The 27-year-old Italian winger recently made his return to the pitch after nearly three months of absence, featuring in a League Cup match against Southampton. The post Federico Chiesa’s Liverpool stint in jeopardy: Potential Serie A return on the horizon appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Liverpool issue update on Leicester City match as thick fog engulfs Merseyside
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Leicester City in the Premier League this evening with heavy fog settling on the region

arts.ttl: Why 'exceptional' Szoboszlai was key to Liverpool win
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2's Jason Mohammad and Glenn Murray discuss Dominik Szoboszlai's "absolutely fantastic" performance for Liverpool during their 6-3 win over Tottenham Hotspur.
